mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_MAC_RECORDS_TEMP ( CARD_NO, R_TIME, DOOR_TYPE, INSERT_BY, EMPID, REMARK, CPNY_ID, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, UPLOAD_DATE, UPLOAD_BY, UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, LINE_ID, RESULT_FLAG, LOCAL_NAME, UPDATED_IP, CREATED_IP, R_DATE, AR_DATE_STR ) VALUES ( #{cardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doorType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'H', #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{lineId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uploadErrorMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'N', #{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT LINE_ID, CARD_NO, R_TIME, DOOR_TYPE, INSERT_BY, EMPID, REMARK, CPNY_ID, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, TO_CHAR(UPLOAD_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS UPLOAD_DATE, UPLOAD_BY, UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, RESULT_FLAG, LOCAL_NAME, R_DATE, AR_DATE_STR FROM AR_MAC_RECORDS_TEMP WHERE UPLOAD_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG IS NOT NULL AND UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG != ''
AND (UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG IS NULL OR UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG = '')
ORDER BY LINE_ID
SELECT PERSON_ID FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV ( RECORD_NO, CARD_NO, PERSON_ID, DOOR_TYPE, INSERT_BY, REMARK, AR_DATE_STR, R_TIME, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( AR_RECORDS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doorType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'H', #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{rDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ' ' || #{rTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 1 )
